properties.property: {"id":5,"name":"Shadow trainer - basic","x":14,"y":18,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_TEAMROCKET_M","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":6,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbTrainerIntro(:TEAMROCKET_M)"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bI\u0027m a basic trainer with a Shadow Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"TrainerBattle.start(:TEAMROCKET_M, \u0022Grunt\u0022, 1)"]},{"c":123,"i":1,"p":["A",0]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbTrainerEnd"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]},{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":true,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_TEAMROCKET_M","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":6,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bDid you manage to snag my Shadow Pok\u00E9mon? "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["Because you can\u0027t battle me again for another "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["chance."]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":6,"name":"Shadow trainer - repeat","x":14,"y":19,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_TEAMROCKET_F","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":6,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbTrainerIntro(:TEAMROCKET_F)"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rYou can battle me repeatedly, and have unlimited "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["attempts to snag my Shadow Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"TrainerBattle.start(:TEAMROCKET_F, \u0022Grunt\u0022, 1)"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"$player.pokedex.owned_shadow_pokemon?(:ELECTABUZZ)"]},{"c":123,"i":2,"p":["A",0]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["pbTrainerEnd"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]},{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":true,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_TEAMROCKET_F","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":6,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rYou\u0027ve managed to snag my Shadow Electabuzz. "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["I\u0027m not going to do anything now."]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":7,"name":"Purify expert","x":18,"y":22,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_SCIENTIST","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":4,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bI can tell you some things about Shadow Pok\u00E9mon"]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["in Essentials. However, the wiki has far more "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["information about them."]},{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bWhat do you want to know?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Information","Shadow Pok\u00E9mon battles","Purifying Pok\u00E9mon","Exit"],4]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Information"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bShadow Pok\u00E9mon are a special kind of Pok\u00E9mon "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["which appeared in Pok\u00E9mon Colosseum and "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon XD."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bThey can be included in Essentials as well. See "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["the wiki for information on how to do this."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Shadow Pok\u00E9mon battles"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bTrainers with Shadow Pok\u00E9mon are set up in "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["exactly the same way as any other trainer."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bAny Pok\u00E9 Ball can be defined as a Snag Ball in "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["items.txt. If $player.has_snag_machine is TRUE, "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["all types of Pok\u00E9 Ball will be Snag Balls automatically."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$player.has_snag_machine = true"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\b$player.pokedex.owned_shadow is an array "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["that keeps track of which Shadow Pok\u00E9mon species "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["have been caught."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Purifying Pok\u00E9mon"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bYou can purify Shadow Pok\u00E9mon in two ways."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bThe first is by bringing them to the Relic Stone here, "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["as in Pok\u00E9mon Colosseum."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bThe second is by placing them in the Purify "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Chamber, as in Pok\u00E9mon XD. You can access it from "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["the PC in Pok\u00E9 Centers."]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"!$player.seen_purify_chamber"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bI\u0027ve now given you access to the Purify Chamber."]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["$player.seen_purify_chamber = true"]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bThe effects of Heart Gauge-lowering items are "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["already in Essentials. You just need to add the items "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["themselves via a PBS file."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Exit"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":13,"name":"Weather controller","x":49,"y":20,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 21","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bI can control the weather. Which weather would "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["you like to see?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["None","Rain","Heavy rain","Storm"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"None"]},{"c":236,"i":1,"p":[0,5,20]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Rain"]},{"c":236,"i":1,"p":[1,9,20]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Heavy rain"]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["Heavy rain is like storm but with no lightning flashes."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$game_screen.weather("]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :HeavyRain, 9, 20"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[")"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Storm"]},{"c":236,"i":1,"p":[2,9,20]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Snow","Blizzard","Sandstorm"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Snow"]},{"c":236,"i":1,"p":[3,9,20]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Blizzard"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$game_screen.weather("]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :Blizzard, 9, 20"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[")"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Sandstorm"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$game_screen.weather("]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" :Sandstorm, 9, 20"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[")"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Sun","Fog"],5]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Sun"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$game_screen.weather(:Sun, 9, 20)"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bThis weather can occur even at night, but doesn\u0027t "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["negate the day/night shading. It\u0027s better if you don\u0027t "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["use it."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Fog"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$game_screen.weather(:Fog, 9, 20)"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":403,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bNote that the weather metadata for this map is set, "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["even though its probability is 0. This prevents the "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["weather from lingering when you leave this map."]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":4,"name":"Duel NPC","x":34,"y":14,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_BLACKBELT","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bHaiiiii-yaaaaaah!"]},{"c":247,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":242,"i":0,"p":[1]},{"c":106,"i":0,"p":[20]},{"c":241,"i":0,"p":[{"_class":"RPG::AudioFile","@volume":100,"@name":"Battle trainer","@pitch":100}]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Duel Minigame, based on the version written by Alael, "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["modified for Pok\u00E9mon Essentials."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The duel takes place in a row of 4 tiles, with the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["player and opponent using the centre two. Make "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["sure you have enough space."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["3 texts for defense, 3 for precise attacks, 3 for fierce "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["attacks, 3 for special attacks."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["$speeches = []"]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["$speeches.push("]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022I shall block all your "]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["attacks!\u0022),"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022Nothing can pierce my armor!\u0022),"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022Behold my dodging skills!\u0022)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[")"]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["$speeches.push("]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022I\u0027ll show you my fighting "]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["skills!\u0022),"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022Awe at the perfection of my "]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["skills!\u0022),"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022I\u0027ll deliver a perfect blow!\u0022)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[")"]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["$speeches.push("]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022Feel my power!\u0022),"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022AAAAHHHH!\u0022),"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022I\u0027ll attack with all my "]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["strength!\u0022)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[")"]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["$speeches.push("]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022Face my secret technique!\u0022),"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022This is my secret technique!\u0022),"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022Evil Blade Strike!\u0022)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[")"]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The opponent in a duel needs a trainer type to be "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["defined in trainertypes.txt. This is used to display a "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["name and graphic for the opponent."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["The opponent does NOT need to appear in "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["trainers.txt, though."]},{"c":111,"i":0,"p":[12,"pbDuel(:BLACKBELT, \u0022Dan\u0022, get_self, $speeches)"]},{"c":242,"i":1,"p":[1]},{"c":106,"i":1,"p":[20]},{"c":248,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bYou won, good job."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":242,"i":1,"p":[1]},{"c":106,"i":1,"p":[20]},{"c":248,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["You lost, too bad."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":10,"name":"Time-dependent NPC","x":18,"y":6,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 01","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bHello.
